basics.name: Alex Muster
basics.label: Head of Product / Director-Level Product Leader
summary: Product and digital leader with 15+ years of experience building and scaling AI-enabled, marketplace, consumer, and operational platforms across mobility, industrial technology, and SaaS.
Currently Head of Digital Products at Beispielwerk, reporting directly to the CEO and leading Product, Design, Engineering, and Marketing across the digital ecosystem.
Track record of accelerating go-to-market by 12 months, growing organic acquisition by 25% across 5 markets, doubling engagement, and increasing subscription revenue by 30%.
Experienced in AI strategy, agentic products, predictive models, data platforms, monetization, and logistics systems spanning first-mile, mid-mile, and last-mile operations.
x_highlights: Built AI/ML applications across computer vision, supply-demand prediction, consumer demand, and agentic product initiatives.
Led operations digitization through partner platforms, digital handover, supply-chain automation, and S&OP process automation.
Managed organizations ranging from senior PMs and cross-functional product teams to a 50-person software organization across six teams.
Contributed to IPO-readiness and leadership transitions, including a Series C fundraising strategy.

work.name: Beispielwerk GmbH
highlights: Report directly to the CEO; lead product vision, AI strategy, roadmap, and execution across the company's digital ecosystem.
Lead four departments — Product, Design, Engineering, and Marketing — driving digital transformation across the organization.
Accelerated go-to-market by 12 months through partnerships, platform redesign, and data-driven roadmap execution.
Contribute to Series C fundraising strategy and key P&L decisions while shaping AI-enabled platform initiatives.

work.name: Wagenmarkt24 GmbH
work.position: Head of Product / Head of Apps
highlights: Owned app vision, strategy, and roadmap across iOS, Android, and white-label apps for a leading European used-car marketplace.
Increased organic acquisition by 25% across 5 markets, doubled engagement, and improved conversion by 20%.
Led monetization and marketplace improvements including sponsored listings and consumer demand use cases that drove 15% advertising revenue growth.
Led 4 senior PMs, 3 app marketers, 2 business analysts, and 20 developers across growth, engagement, conversion, and revenue.

work.name: Fahrwerk Mobility GmbH
highlights: Led product strategy across partner platform, purchasing, operations, remarketing, customer apps, and digital handover workflows in a multi-market mobility business.
Owned first-mile, mid-mile, and last-mile logistics, including supply-chain automation, S&OP process automation, and mid-mile planning systems.
Partnered with data teams to establish data lake foundations and build predictive, supply-demand, and operational planning models that reduced logistics-related costs.
Led asset financing and production product responsibilities; increased subscription revenue by 30% and vehicle contribution margin by 40%.

work.name: Industrieoptik AG
highlights: Led software and product development for computer-vision solutions, managing 50 people across six teams and three departments.
Built AI and machine-vision systems for industrial metrology and automotive manufacturing, including a damage-detection model for precision machine environments.
Delivered robotics-based production cells and optical measurement systems that reduced production errors and cycle times.
Partnered with C-level leaders on strategic, operational, and financial priorities including budgets, subcontracts, and vendor decisions.

work.name: Datendienst Consulting
highlights: Built embedded software for automotive and avionics applications, including cockpit display hardware, diagnostic tools, and validation systems.
Developed testing frameworks and system validation tooling to improve reliability, quality, and compliance.

awards.title: Best App — national app store award 2023
Manufacturing quality consultant at a design center
